entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi @AZAK ,

Yes, we have a plan for the VSCode publish, and we are working on it.

Xin

entry.title: Re: How to populate custom field for app Manage Customer Line Items ?
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

Thank you for highlighting the risk.

We have similar requirement where the business needs a custom field added as a column in 'Manage Customer line Items' app.

I followed the steps in blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/custom-fields-for-the-quot-manage-customer-line-items-quot-app-use-case/bc-p/13770521#M57125 and was able to get the field populated for newly created entries. But the challenge is to populate this field for existing entries as well.

Can you please guide on how this can be done with minimal risk?

Best Regards,

Richa

entry.title: Re: Can you capitalise an asset with depreciation?
entry.content: Hi Buddy Please check the guidance for AS91 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/67e323b7117e4c91869c258933f47182/aeff248b537848bc838f5a4c17c0cbc5.html?q=AS91&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: DVM Self Service ST release for ERP legacy system
entry.content: Hi David, just to make sure again, our current ST component version is ST720 08, based on your statement "ST710 SP12 or above", can we proceed with the next steps or we need to upgrade the ST in SP12 first before we proceed?

entry.title: Re: Error Logs in SQL SAP Anywhere 17
entry.content:
Hi

By default, SQL Anywhere doesn't output log file.
If you want to output SQL Anywhere logs, set the option.

Next options print all database server messages, including informational messages, errors, warnings, and MESSAGE statement output, to the specified file, and to the database server messages window.

-oe Database Server Option
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SQL_Anywhere/61ecb3d4d8be4baaa07cc4db0ddb5d0a/3bca3b906c5f1014af6de05aa798f052.html?locale=en-US

-o Database Server Option
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SQL_Anywhere/61ecb3d4d8be4baaa07cc4db0ddb5d0a/3bcd15236c5f1014a134edce6d0c2481.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How planning strategy 70 controls the creation of P.I.R?
entry.content:
Dear Derek, very appreciate ur reply and help here.

Furthermore , could you pls advise how to control a strategy to/or not to create Planned Independent Requirement (P.I.R)?  Is there any indicator or parameter to make it happen ? Or it's just SAP hardcode?

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bitget : bet365 | Qu'est-ce que le bonus d'inscription d'un nouvel utilisateur ?
entry.content:
Échange de crypto-monnaieBitget
Code de parrainage Bitgetbet365
Réduction des frais de transaction jusqu'à 50%
Bonus de bienvenue5 000 USD de bonus.
Remises et bonus100 % de réduction à vie et 5 000 $ de bonus.

Vous recherchez un code de parrainage Bitget ? Depuis le 25 juillet 2024, « bet365 » est le code de parrainage Bitget. En utilisant ce code d'invitation, les nouveaux utilisateurs et traders peuvent bénéficier d'une réduction de 50 % sur les frais de négociation. De plus, ceux qui s'inscrivent avec le code promotionnel « bet365 » peuvent recevoir un bonus promotionnel exclusif d'une valeur de 5 000 USDT, comprenant une boîte mystère d'une valeur de 500 USDT.Le code « bet365 » dans le programme de code de parrainage Bitget sert de code de parrainage. En saisissant ce code, les nouveaux utilisateurs bénéficieront d'une réduction permanente des frais de trading ainsi que d'une remise de 50% sur leurs transactions. De plus, si vous partagez votre code de parrainage avec vos amis, vous avez une chance de gagner un généreux bonus de 50 %. L'utilisation de ce code offre une opportunité précieuse de réduire les frais et potentiellement d'augmenter vos revenus en attirant d'autres personnes sur la plateforme.

entry.title: Re: All transactions linked to a material in one app
entry.content:
There is another app "Monitor material Coverage" and "Manage Material Coverage" which like MD04 that you can use.

 

 


Since MD04 is a GUI App, it will not be updated. So we suggest you can use the apps mentioned above.
If you want to display the production order / sales order , you can use the COOIS.
And you can also add fields to display.

entry.title: Feedback gathering for GACE - person model for Goals
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am Vanessa from SuccessFactors Goals Management product team. Quick question/discussion point for you all:

For companies enabling GA/CE, are there any requests to view goals/manage performance goals on a person level, not at employment level?

  • View all goals plans and goals in one place assigned to this person (instead of viewing goal plans separately for both employments?)
  • Managers need to see all the goals of the employee from both employments?
  • How do you anticipate the rating should be integrated with the Performance Form for both employments? Should Performance Review Forms still be separate for both employments?
  • Is this ask more for performance or development goals?

 

Thanks, let me know!

Vanessa

entry.title: Bitget viittauskoodi: bet365 - Mikä on uuden käyttäjän rekisteröintibonus?
entry.content:
KryptovaluuttavaihtoBitget
Bitget viitekoodibet365
Transaktiomaksun alennusjopa 50 %
Tervetuliaisbonus$5,000 USD bonus
Alennukset ja bonukset100 % elinikäinen alennus ja 5 000 dollarin bonus.

Etsitkö Bitget viitekoodia? 25. heinäkuuta 2024 alkaen "bet365" on Bitget-viittauskoodi. Käyttämällä tätä kutsukoodia uudet käyttäjät ja kauppiaat saavat 50 % alennuksen kaupankäyntimaksuista. Lisäksi ne, jotka rekisteröityvät tarjouskoodilla "bet365", voivat saada eksklusiivisen 5 000 USDT:n kampanjabonuksen, mukaan lukien mysteerilaatikon, jonka arvo on 500 USDT.Bitget viittauskoodiohjelman koodi "bet365" toimii viittauskoodina. Syöttämällä tämän koodin uudet käyttäjät saavat pysyvän alennuksen kaupankäyntimaksuista sekä 50 % alennuksen liiketoimistaan. Lisäksi, jos jaat suosituskoodisi ystäviesi kanssa, sinulla on mahdollisuus ansaita runsas 50 % bonus. Tämän koodin käyttäminen tarjoaa arvokkaan mahdollisuuden alentaa maksuja ja mahdollisesti lisätä tulojasi houkuttelemalla muita alustalle.

entry.title: Bitget referans kodu: bet365 - Yeni kullanıcı kayıt bonusu nedir?
entry.content:
Kripto para borsasıBitget
Bitget referans kodubet365
İşlem ücreti indirimi%50'ye kadar
Hoşgeldin Bonusu5.000$ Bonus.
İndirimler ve BonuslarÖmür boyu %100 indirim ve 5.000$ bonus.

Bitget referans kodunu mu arıyorsunuz? 25 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren "bet365", Bitget yönlendirme kodudur. Bu davet kodunu kullanarak yeni kullanıcılar ve yatırımcılar işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirimden yararlanabilirler. Ayrıca "bet365" promosyon koduyla kayıt yaptıranlar, 500 USDT değerinde gizemli kutu da dahil olmak üzere 5.000 USDT değerinde özel bir promosyon bonusu kazanabilecekler.Bitget referans kodu programındaki "bet365" kodu, referans kodu görevi görmektedir. Bu kodu girerek, yeni kullanıcılar işlem ücretlerinde kalıcı bir indirimin yanı sıra işlemlerinde %50 indirim alacaktır. Ayrıca, referans kodunuzu arkadaşlarınızla paylaşırsanız %50 oranında cömert bir bonus kazanma şansınız da olur. Bu kodu kullanmak, ücretleri düşürmek ve başkalarını platforma çekerek kazancınızı potansiyel olarak artırmak için değerli bir fırsat sunar.

entry.title: Codice referral Bitget: bet365 - Qual è il nuovo bonus di registrazione utente?
entry.content:
Scambio di criptovalutaBitget
Codice referral Bitgetbet365
Riduzione delle commissioni di transazionefino al 50%
Bonus di benvenutobonus di $ 5.000 USD.
Sconti e bonussconto a vita del 100% e bonus di $ 5.000.

Stai cercando il codice referral Bitget? Dal 25 luglio 2024, "bet365" è il codice di riferimento di Bitget. Utilizzando questo codice di invito, i nuovi utenti e i trader possono usufruire di uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di negoziazione. Inoltre, coloro che si registrano con il codice promozionale "bet365" possono ricevere un bonus promozionale esclusivo del valore di 5.000 USDT, inclusa una scatola misteriosa del valore di 500 USDT.Il codice "bet365" nel programma di codici di referral Bitget funge da codice di riferimento. Inserendo questo codice, i nuovi utenti riceveranno una riduzione permanente delle commissioni di negoziazione e uno sconto del 50% sulle loro transazioni. Inoltre, se condividi il tuo codice referral con i tuoi amici, hai la possibilità di guadagnare un generoso bonus del 50%. L'utilizzo di questo codice offre una preziosa opportunità per ridurre le commissioni e potenzialmente aumentare i tuoi guadagni attirando altri sulla piattaforma.

entry.title: Re: how to get pi audit log entry by java

entry.title: Re: Gear up for SAP Sales Cloud certification - Expert Live sessions on 6th - 7th Aug 2024
entry.content: We need a better name for v2. Perhaps NGAP II

entry.title: Questions about Solman Security optimization service
entry.content:
Hi Team,

This is information request to understand 

1) Security optimization service is configurable in 7.2 SPS 17 ?

2) Is it pre-delivered or having separate licensed installation?

3) Do we have documentation on how to perform configurations for this version? or its same as DIGITS previous versions ?  

4) Any additional precautions do we need to consider?

Please advise.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Questions about Solman Security optimization service
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please see answers for your questions:

1) Security optimization service is configurable in 7.2 SPS 17 ?
A: Yes, it is still working to configure the SOS report in Solution Manager 7.2 SP17. Please see the supported system types in KBA 2916949 Advanced Remote Service Delivery - Availability Matrix.

2) Is it pre-delivered or having separate licensed installation?
A: It is pre-delivered. For the detailed steps to create a self-service, please see KBA 2792789 How to create a Self-Service Session in SAP Solution Manager 7.2. It's suggested to select the session with "Automated" in the name. The non-automated is only for processors who have enough skill to perform the session manually.

3) Do we have documentation on how to perform configurations for this version? or its same as 696478 previous versions?
A: You can refer to the KBA 2792789 in anwer 2) for the general steps. To get more detailed information specific to the Security optimization service, please see the following notes or pages:
696478-SAP Security Optimization: Preparation, additions
2036188 - How questionnaire influences results of Security Optimization Service

4) Any additional precautions do we need to consider?
A: Again, it's suggested to select the session with "Automated" in the name. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Bitget tilvísunarkóði: bet365 - Hver er nýr skráningarbónus fyrir notendur?
entry.content:
DulritunargjaldeyrisskiptiBitget
Bitget tilvísunarkóðibet365
Lækkun viðskiptagjaldsallt að 50%
Velkominn bónus$5.000 USD bónus.
Afslættir og bónusar100% æviafsláttur og $5.000 bónus.

Ertu að leita að Bitget tilvísunarkóða? Frá 25. júlí 2024 er "bet365" Bitget tilvísunarkóði. Með því að nota þennan boðskóða geta nýir notendur og kaupmenn notið 50% afsláttar af viðskiptagjöldum. Að auki geta þeir sem skrá sig með kynningarkóðann „bet365“ fengið einkaréttan kynningarbónus að verðmæti 5.000 USDT, þar á meðal leyndardómsbox að verðmæti 500 USDT.Kóðinn "bet365" í Bitget tilvísunarkóðaforritinu þjónar sem tilvísunarkóði. Með því að slá inn þennan kóða fá nýir notendur varanlega lækkun viðskiptagjalda sem og 50% afslátt af viðskiptum sínum. Að auki, ef þú deilir tilvísunarkóðanum þínum með vinum þínum, hefurðu möguleika á að vinna þér inn rausnarlegan 50% bónus. Notkun þessa kóða býður upp á dýrmætt tækifæri til að lækka gjöld og hugsanlega auka tekjur þínar með því að laða aðra að vettvangnum.

SAP Integration Suite #

entry.title: SAP shutdown
entry.content:
Many times following error shows and SAP is shutdown. Can anyone what is the issue, why it happens??

The program SAP Business One.exe version 10.0.180.0 stopped interacting with Windows and was closed. To see if more information about the problem is available, check the problem history in the Security and Maintenance control panel.
Process ID: 1861c
Start Time: 01dade451abca2c6
Termination Time: 28
Application Path: C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One\SAP Business One.exe
Report Id: a337241b-4a38-11ef-b82c-0050568f8fb3
Faulting package full name:
Faulting package-relative application ID:

requirement is system should validate for GST conditions ( JOIG,JOCG,JOSG,JOUG) in pricing procedure .so i have applied one routine in pricing procedure based on logic - that system should validate for Plant's region (REGIO)and ship to Party 'region (REGIO)  and given logic for JOIG,JOCG& JOSG but how can i do the same for JOUG as for union territories state region are in same table where all sates code maintained

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Maintenance Renewal
entry.content: hello, i'm facing a similar issue but the partner is asking to clear out outstanding payments only then i'll be able to purchase more licenses, is it true or can i buy more without paying amc.

entry.title: Porting Apps to SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi everyone! im new to SAP BTP so i want to ask some question. so I have this current setup on my application:

- the web framework is written using python programming language and flask
- parallel processing is written using python and celery
- the task queue I used is redis
- deployment is handled by kubernetes
- database is Postgres with PG-Bouncer for managing the connection

So I need to move those component to the SAP BTP, but I don't have enough resource to do that, can you please give me advice or reference doccument how to do that, what I'm already try is deploying native python program to BTP using the cloud foundry and connect it to HANA DB.

And my boss said that it is possible to develop the apps inside the BTP, so he said I just need to port the current apps into BTP using python and postgres and all other things like the parallel processing, deployment, security will be handled by the SAP BTP (so I don't need K8S, Redis, Celery). is it possible to do that? Thankss!

Thanks,

Sarbajeet

entry.title: Re: How to link views from SAP HANA Database Explorer to SAC
entry.content: Hi Jeff, Could you please share the PDF regarding SAP HANA Cloud Calculation view consume in SAC via LIVE connection...please share to may mail satish.bw3@gmail.com

entry.title: SAP readiness check for S4HANA report takes days to complete
entry.content:
I am running S4HANA readiness check report. It is running too long after selecting FDQ option. Is there an option to optimize it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP readiness check for S4HANA report takes days to c...
entry.content:
Dear customer,
 
The data collection of Financial Data Quality is based on the data volume in your system ,and this check could run longer than other checks.
Since they will collect all the finance data, so long running time of several days/or even weeks is not a strange behavior.

And if necessary, it's recommended to schedule the Financial Data Quality check in isolation from rest of the SAP Readiness Check data collectors. 
Once complete, the results of the Financial Data Quality check can then be appended (using the Upload function) to the analysis session created with the original ZIP archive.

Best regards,
Yuki
SAP Support

entry.title: GST Picking Procedure in case of SEZ Vendors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In our General Business Senoria Based on the condition types and Business place GST GLs are picking.

In case of SEZ Vendor should not flow as normal, it should take new GL (1234567).

And one more thing want to Know Whether Intra state and Interstate Transactions Only IGST GL should Pick?

Kindly Advise Us What Configuration is Required in case of SEZ Vendors for picking GST GL.

Regards

Chiranjeevi

entry.title: Re: SEN Manager (Hana) not started
entry.content:
Hi Dmitry,

Unfortunately, the screenshots you provided are not helpful in determining the root cause of the error message you received. Check the Apache Tomcat Logs, which are in the logs folder of the Apache Tomcat. 

Also, have you increased the maximum .war file size Apache Tomcat can process? It should be mentioned in the Manager Installation Manual.

One more thing: your SAP Enable Now Manager version is almost 2 years old, so it might not support the newest HANA 2.0 SPS. Just for you to know 😉

entry.title: Re: DVM Self Service ST release for ERP legacy system
entry.content: ST720 08 means SAP Solution Manager 7.20 SP8. According to note 2035999 "These features are available in SAP Solution Manager 7.2", there is no restriction on 7.2 SP level.

entry.title: Re: Form : bulk invoice print out
entry.content:
Good day,

There is no such concept as bulk invoice in S/4 Public cloud sales .  

But there is a localization for linking E-way billing to outgoing documents in bulk for India.

Hence request you to provide more context

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Commodity Codes in Ariba
entry.content:
@Chhetan1 Is it possible to automate the process via an API ? D we have any available API endpoints from Ariba to update the Taxonomy classification. I have central system which will send the updates on the Commodity and Segments through an API, currently we are manually downloading from the updates from inhouse central system and uploading again to SAP Ariba manually.
I couldn't find any API details . Do you have any suggestions?

entry.title: Re: The System Cannot be Reached Log on data Could not be used.

entry.title: Re: Why is my plant showing as red when I look a it on zc...
entry.content: transaction that allows you to see which plants are under the material

entry.title: Re: Feedback gathering for GACE - person model for Goals
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi 

Please check my response in bold.

For companies enabling GA/CE, are there any requests to view goals/manage performance goalson a person level, not at employment level?

  • View all goals plans and goals in one place assigned to this person (instead of viewing goal plans separately for both employments?) – A custom BTP screen or SAC can be used to view all goals in a single screen.
  • Managers need to see all the goals of the employee from both employments?- A custom BTP screen or SAC can be used to view all goals in a single screen.
  • How do you anticipate the rating should be integrated with the Performance Form for both employments? Should Performance Review Forms still be separate for both employments?- A report can be created to merge the ratings or a custom BTP application can be used to display both form's ratings.
  • Is this ask more for performance or development goals? – I believe this is common but as of now, the product is not providing such features

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP BW/4HANA to SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

We have the documentation in SAP Help portal on details about SAP BW/4HANA Model Transfer Connections SAP BW∕4HANA Model Transfer Connections | SAP Help Portal

We can find the steps for setting up Live data connections as well here Create Live Data Connection of Type Tunnel | SAP Help Portal

Thanks and Regards,

VAni

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Connect to Microsoft 365 Mail with OAuth2
entry.content:
Hi @franz_forsthofer, thanks for the detailed steps. Currently I'm able to read mail from the mailbox configured in User Name field of OAuth2 Authorization Code but having issue with other shared mailboxes that also the member of the same Azure Directory. 

Can you please share how to read email from a different shared mailbox using the same OAuth2 Authorization Code? From the screenshot, look like we need to reauthorize the other shared mailbox using Sign in with other account option but it will prompt for password which the shared mailbox doesn't have when I trying to do so .

Thank you.

Regards,
Lim

Kindly suggest.

entry.title: Re: User status update in Equipment Master based on Maint...
entry.content: Thanks for the response. Can you please elaborate little bit steps to follow this process. I am new to this process.

entry.title: Intelligent ERP use cases in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hello SAP Cloud ERP Community 🔊

the second major release of the year is out since July 24. You certainly have read the very comprehensive release blog from Bert Schulze.

In this blog, as part of our intelligent ERP blog post series, I'll share the key innovations with as always the focus on "intelligent technologies" like Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management framework, and their impact on business processes. We will look at some use cases for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2408, delivered to the customers on July 24.

If you'd like to have a quicker understand of this blog, we have summarised the key "intelligent ERP" innovations in this video for your convenience: 

 

🎧User Experience Update with SAP Joule and My Home

Now let's start with an innovation that is changing completely the way customers will work with SAP: of course I will start with Joule, our natural-language, generative AI copilot, embedded into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. SAP Joule is also embedded in other SAP solutions like SAP SuccessFactors, with the ambition to enrich then entire SAP portfolio. Joule is your co-pilot. Yes you are right, this has a history at SAP, for those who know  to the former SAP Co-Pilot assistant, now brought to the next level thanks to the GenAI revolutionising technology. SAP Joule completely changes the way users works with the system and their key application: it is one click away, in-place, increases efficiency, shares insights and analytics, always in the right business context.

Simply said: SAP Joule will support you in getting your work done faster, making every task simpler, reducing mundane tasks, and driving better business outcomes in a secure and compliant way.

After a success early adopter program that is currently running, we have great news: Joule is planned to be in general availability with the next “continuous delivery” later this year. And make sure to follow the enablement offering of our team (see the wheel below for more details) as we will share the key learnings of the early adopter program with our ecosystem, like at the next Product Expert Training planned in September 2024 for our partners.

In a nutshel: stay tuned for an amazing SAP experience transforming how you will interact with the SAP suite!

Next I'd like to continue with the focus on the end user, and present some additional User Experience innovations. We have already introduced "My Home". With the My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, end users benefit from a personalized interface tailored to their needs, with important to-dos and insights readily accessible.

In this release, we offer new customers intelligent app recommendations. Those are based on several factors such as usage of the app, geography, or access. We also offer intelligent generation of pre-delivered cards.

Additionally, we support situations of the standard situations framework, as well as of the extended situations framework in the To Dos section.

💡SAP Business AI overview

Let's move on to Business AI. What does this term mean at all? Business AI is simply SAP Artificial Intelligence  built for the business, AI built for you, available in all line-of-business solutions. It elevates the value of the ERP process with an approach unique in the industry. These are the learnings of more than 5 decades of partnership and projects with thousands of customers, running their businesses across all lines-of-business, managing a gold mine of data. SAP Business AI spans across the entire SAP portfolio, as depicted in this best-of-suite illustration.

With this release, we have embedded AI at the heart of several business processes such as Finance, Manufacturing and Project Management.

Let’s pick Finance as example, where I’d like to mention 2 innovations in beta shipments: The first one a reporting case, that make it possible to use generative AI to analyze and summarize the data from a cost-center-review booklet, into financial business insights, supported by our digital assistant Joule

The second example is a quite specific configuration case for the Unites States.. It offers to leverage Gen AI in a US Tax Configuration solution leveraging Joule, that massively helps reduce complexity of this task. This will speak to all experts is this domain, what a release...

Next on - resource management, In our Technology Industry – it is all about project management, with the imperative to optimise all kind of resources: money, time, people,.... Is this field Artificial Intelligence can massively improve business processes too, and provide a very different project management experience.

I’d like to introduce an innovation that will help all of us, and help get to a more efficient project management planning and staffing. In the new SAP Project and Resource Management, resource management is supported by a new Intelligent matching of employees, to the expected skills on the project.

Searching skilled employees for a resource request has never been easier thanks to the advanced skill match supports. This is part of beta testing as well. 

 

📡Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management framework update

To close this update, I’ll dig into the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management framework – short ISLM.

ISLM is a framework that allows you to perform lifecycle management operations on machine learning scenarios.

For this release, let me mention 2 scenarios. The first one is a GenAI use cases support: ISLM acts as the bridge between the application and the LLM models, and allows exploration and activation of out of the box scenarios

The second example is called "Auto enablement (turnkey) of Machine Learning use cases". As the name says, it means less manual effort, not specific knowledge needed, more outcome of the business users, when is comes to search, activation and usage of machine learning cases provided by SAP.

Thanks for your time reading this update. Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn.

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series! 

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a xx-minute-long recording and a presentation for LoB/Industry/Topic as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎 Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Create SAPUI5 multiple layout application
entry.content:

- Dashboard: Explore Overview Pages which can be developed using Fiori Elements
- Side-By-Side: View the flexible column layout as this is quite helpful
- Routing: If your whole application suite consists of independent applications, built an UI5 app for each of them and connect the via routing via semantic object.

Good Luck!

entry.title: Re: Is Scheduling publication for stories based on DWC co...
entry.content: Thank you William_Yu. Then I need to wait one more year ...

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Connect to Microsoft 365 Mail with OAuth2
entry.content:
Hi Lim,

I understand that you have a user which is member of two shared mailboxes and you want to read mails of the two shared mailboxes with one OAuth2 Authorization Code credential. 

This is not supported. In the chapter "Reading from a Shared Mailbox"  I mentioned that you have to specify the e-mail address of the shared mailbox in the configuration of the OAuth2 Authorization Code credential. Therefore the OAuth2 Authorization Code credential can only read mails from the specified e-mail address. So you have to create two OAuth2 Authorization Code credentials, one for each shared mailbox.

entry.title: Re: AR - Open Items Migration in SAP Public Cloud: Interf...
entry.content:
Dear,

other than files approach, please refer to

2733253 - FAQ for SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. Migration approach: Transfer / Migrate data using staging tables - SAP for Me

"To use the Remote SAP HANA Database schema, you need to create a database connection by creating a communication arrangement for communication scenario SAP_COM_0678 (Migration Cockpit Integration). You can do this by using the Communication Arrangements Fiori app. However, you must first deploy the SAP the SAP HANA Cloud instance on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Please note that additional costs may apply. For the successful communication configuration between the SAP HANA Cloud instance and SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit, you need to have set up SAP HANA Cloud on the SAP BTP"

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: Remove indentation in Hierarchy SAC
entry.content:
@Alebarba 

I think its not possible currently to  un indent the hierarchy view of the dimension.

 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603
entry.content:
Hi SAP Project System Experts,

I am reaching out to request your help and support in our SAP PS AVAC analysis.

We're encountering challenges in PS budget. Where, system is throwing budget exceeded error for many WBS elements, despite the budget not actually being exceeded. In some cases MRP and project execution have begun before budget release(CJ32). And CJ32 is now preventing us from releasing the WBS due to a budget exceedance error, despite the budget not actually being exceeded.

We are having BOM structure as follows. And here I have taken an example for Semi finished product BOM.

We are posting consumption through production orders for this W-Code BOM. After this consumption, once the W-code stock is available, we will proceed to post the outbound delivery.

Please find detailed steps below for Material consumptions and Sales outbound delivery:

  • We procure B-Code materials and formulated a W-Code BOM to utilize them effectively.
  • Upon confirming the production order for W-Code, the system proceeded to consume the B-Code materials and manufacture the W-Code product. During this stage, cost element 401009 was debited and cost element 401002 was credited, both associated with their respective WBS elements, resulting in a net zero balance in “cji3”.
  • Following material consumption, we initiated outbound delivery, where the system debited cost element 401003 against the relevant WBS element.

I have attached screenshots of the AVAC and accounting entries for your review. These images clearly show two debit postings of cost elements with associated WBS allocations, as well as one credit posting of a cost element also tied to a specific WBS.

Budget AVAC for reference WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03

Accounting entries for Production order confirmation.

Accounting entries for Outbound delivery

As checked in SAP report “S_ALR_87013558” & “CJI3”, the cost of WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03 is below the budget of INR 30,000.

Report: S_ALR_87013558

CJI3

Could you please assist us in reviewing the situation where we are unable to activate AVAC due to exceeding our budget?

We are encountering a similar challenge in our multi-level BOM, where the system accumulates costs across each BOM level without accounting for credits to AVAC, resulting in budget exceeded errors.

As shown in below example, the total cost of the finished product is INR 1000. However, when consuming the first SFG, AVAC calculates the cost as INR 700 & 300, and when consuming the FG, the system calculates an additional INR 1000, resulting in a budget exceeded error.

I've already escalated this to SAP, and they advised implementing the specified S_Notes. Subsequently, we executed CJBW, CJBN, and CJEN as instructed by SAP. However, the issue persists despite these actions.

S_Notes:
1594484
1038917
3028730
2795283

We kindly request your guidance to ensure if we are correctly following the procedures for the PS module and not missing any activity here?

Thank you,
Yash (FI)

entry.title: CDS View Performance best practices
entry.content:
Hi,

I came across on the information that we can improve the performance of CDS by adding the below annotations.  Is there any particular order that we have to follow or any order is fine?

@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality
@ObjectModel.usageType.sizeCategory
@ObjectModel.usageType.dataClass

entry.title: Explore SAP BW/4HANA Learning: Your Ultimate Guide
entry.content:
Hardly any tool in SAP's history has a longer history and a larger community than SAP BW. With tens of thousands of customers using this data warehousing solution, there is a global community of data modelers, analytics specialists and developers who have acquired in-depth knowledge of its core functions in recent years.  

You are not one of them or you are but want to enhance your skills? No problem, use this blog as an ultimate guide for your learning opportunities in SAP BW/4HANA: 

Start your journey here:  

Getting Started Building an On-Premise Data Warehouse using SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Get foundational knowledge and a holistic overview of SAP BW/4HANA 

Implementing a data warehouse using SAP BW/4HANA    

  • Acquire the ability to understand a data warehouse using SAP BW/4HANA from the ground up 

Creating Queries in SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Learn how to create sophisticated queries in SAP BW/4HANA 

Implementing Modeling Scenarios in SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Design BW/4HANA data models based on the LSA++ layered scalable architecture model  

Implementing Data Provisioning in SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Develop the skills to implement data provisioning in SAP BW/4HANA 

Upskill here:  

Upgrading Your SAP BW Skills to SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Acquire essential Delta knowledge between SAP BW and SAP BW/4HANA 

Implementing Authorizations in SAP BW/4HANA 

  • Implement Authorizations in SAP BW/4HANA ensuring data security and access control 

Get certified here: 

SAP Certified Associate - Data Engineer - Data Fabric  

  • Verify that you possess the core knowledge of SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere 

Enjoy Learning! 

Product Learning CoE Analytics Team

entry.title: Re: CCLM Querying data by BW content like 0SM_CCLM
entry.content:
Firstly, I would recommend to take advantage of the standard CCLM function(tile) called Decommissioning Cockpit, where a project can be created and unused objects will be listed together with object attributes like object type,  last used date, packge etc. See attached file for example. For more details, please refer to CCLM how-to guide.

Then if you still would like to build up some custom query, there are several BW cubes that are storing the objects data, like 0SM_UPLDD, 0SM_UPLMM, 0SM_UPLMY, 0CCMAW etc. For transaction (TRAN) type object, 0CCMAW is relevant BW cube; For other object types like program(PROG), 0SM_UPLMM could be a proper one considering it is the month aggregation and the default retention period for housekeeping is 18 month. 0SM_UPLDD records data on daily basis, by default data older than 14 days will be deleted and will be aggregated into 0SM_UPLMM before deletion. 0SM_UPLMY is the year aggregation but with less details.

PS:
CCLM supported object types are as below:
PROG: only for executable programs usage can be collected from UPL/SCMON or in
some cases from workload statistics
PROG: for includes usage can be derived from main object: If the respective main object
is marked as used, all includes of this main object will be marked as well. Only accurate
for SAP Severity = 5.
METH: Usage of methods can be collected from UPL/SCMON
CLAS: Usage of classes can be collected based on UPL/SCMON derived from assigned
methods: If any method of a class is marked as used, then the respective class will be
marked as used as well.
FUNC: Usage of function modules can be collected from UPL/SCMON
FUGR: Usage of function groups can be collected based on UPL/SCMON derived from
assigned function modules: If any function module of a function group is marked as used,
then the respective function group will be marked as used as well.
DEVC: Usage of development classes can be collected based on UPL/SCMON derived
from assigned objects: If any object of a development is marked as used, then the
respective development class will be marked as used as well.
TRAN: Usage of transaction can only be collected from workload statistics.
(UPL/SCMON cannot record usage of transactions)
Webdynpro and BSP: Collected within the Usage-Map-Extractor since SP12.
(WDYN and WDYA WAPA)

entry.title: Re: Partial scrap confirmation in DM, Quantity Confirmati...
entry.content:
Just a little addendum: To ensure that operators don't accidentally scrap the complete SFC by forgetting to enter the scrap quantity, make the Quantity field mandatory.

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: Authorization object for MRP Area
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Our client is also having a similar requirement to control the access of the users based on MRP Area, Material group and Material type. What is the Solution to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Consuming a CAP OData service from SAP Mobile Service...
entry.content:
You can go with either of these options:

  1. Provide the CAP OData service URL in your mobile destination.
  2. Define a destination in the BTP cockpit and refer to it from the mobile destination using the SAP Destination Service option. This option is quite useful if you want to reuse the same destination for multiple applications (e.g., mobile and Fiori projects) and manage it centrally.

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors as User Details Data Source in GRC Access Control
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I've a requirement to configure SAP SuccessFactors as User Search/Details Data Source in GRC Access Control. How can we do this?

Can we have a map fields from SF to AC in SPRO to pick data in AC fields as required? Also, SF has different entities like employee, department, etc. Can we map fields in AC from any entity? Are there any pre-requisites or additional settings/parameters required to perform this mapping?

Thanks,

Kaushal

entry.content: you can do this in HANA Cloud Central: https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-connections

entry.title: Planned quantity vs Daily progress quantity vs Actual billed quantity
entry.content:
Hi team, we have requirement of tracking project projected planning quantity(on monthly basis) vs DPR quantity.How we can achieve this.

We created a project based and with the help of operatives indicator created a sales order and based on actual measurements quantity we are billing to the client.

entry.title: Sourcing & Procurement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hey procurement fellows,

I'm back from parental leave and bring the energy down to this new blog giving you insights on SAP S/4HANA Cloud release 2408 for Sourcing & Procurement. To get an overview on the release highlights, please watch this video by my colleague @sangdao. Kudos go to the colleagues in development!

 


For other releases please see here.

Operational Procurement

  • Shipping notification in document flow of self-service purchase requisition 
  • Document Management System (DMS) attachments on the purchase order header
  • Edit during approval for supplier confirmation
  • Sending DMS-based header attachments in EDI, print and e-mail channels for purchase order output

Contract Management

  • Versioning in purchase contracts

Central Procurement

  • Mass change of centrally managed purchase requisitions in offline mode
  • Display of overall invoice consumption on central contract item and distribution levels

Operational Procurement

Shipping notification in document flow of self-service purchase requisition 

With this release we enable requestors to track the shipment of their goods by pulling up any order acknowledgments or advanced shipping notifications from their respective supplier. This way we improve requestors' visibility of purchase requisition ordering and shipping status by integrating shipping notifications into the self-service requisition document flow. For more information, see: My Purchase Requisitions - New

 

Back to top 

Document Management System (DMS) attachments on the purchase order header

With this feature, purchasers can add DMS (Document Management System) attachments to the purchase order header via the Manage Purchase Orders or Create Purchase Order – Advance app. The attachments can be sent along with the purchase order to the supplier. With this innovation you will be able to change the default customization. We speed up the processing with the Harmonized Document Management (HDM) for purchase order header attachments in the SAP Fiori app Manage Purchase Orders. HDM allows your purchasers to work with documents from different document frameworks in a single user interface once activated by the configuration expert. This way we allow to change the default customization and let your restrict the use of new purchase order attachments through Generic Object Services (GOS) attachments, i.e. no new GOS attachments can be created, existing GOS attachments are visible. Your benefit is an increased efficiency through a similar behavior for header attachments. For more information, see: Manage Purchase Orders and Create Purchase Order - Advanced

 

 Back to top 

Edit during approval for supplier confirmation

Purchasers can now edit supplier confirmations that are presently undergoing approval workflow. When a supplier confirmation that is presently undergoing approval workflow is changed, the approval workflow is restarted. This improves flexibility and useability of supplier confirmation which requires to be updated before getting finally approved. For more information, see: Manage Workflows for Supplier Confirmations

 

 

 

Back to top 

Sending DMS-based header attachments in EDI, print and e-mail channels for purchase order output

As of now DMS attachments which are stored in the purchase order header level can be sent through output generated via EDI, Print and/or Email channel. The DMS attachments (Doc.Type SL1) that are configured for the purchase order outputs can be sent through purchase order output channels, when HDM (Harmonized Document Management) is active. Configuration experts can activate it via SSCUI ID 105346. DMS attachment allows to you classify attachment by document type. Each document type for output can be configured individually. This improves efficiency for  business user in attaching and sending important documents to supplier for the respective purchase order at the header level. For more information, see: Purchase Order Header Attachments in EDI Channel Output

 

 

Back to top 

Contract Management

Versioning in purchase contracts

A purchase contract is an agreement between a buyer and a supplier with agreed pricing, quantity, terms, and conditions. Since purchase contracts are long-term documents, they are subject to change over time. Versioning of purchase contracts enables you to track different versions of the contract each time you make changes to an active purchase contract. When you make changes to the fields that are set up for versioning, a new version is created. Depending on the approval process, this new version then becomes the active document. This way we enable you to retain an active purchase contract as the operational contract until the new version of the purchase contract is approved. In addition, it allows the creation of follow-on purchase orders even if the new version of the purchase contract is still in approval.

Purchasers can compare changes between two versions of a purchase contract along with pricing information, thus helping you track changes for a long-term purchase contract. In order to make this available for end users, configuration experts need to define version-relevant fields in SSCUI ID 103497 and set up version management in SSCUI ID 103498, i.e. activate versioning for specific contract types and purchase organizations. For more details watch the demo video below.

 

Back to top  

SAP Ariba Central Procurement*

Mass change of centrally managed purchase requisitions in offline mode

WIth release 2408 central purchasers are able to create, update and delete purchase requisitions in all the backend systems connected to the central procurement hub by offline Microsoft Excel up-/downloads.For example to close or delete unwanted requisitions, generate demands from external planning systems, or add missing accounting information to an Unknown account assignment. A central purchaser can also trigger a simulation run of planned mass changes and display potential update errors before the actual release of the mass changes. This will increase flexibility and usability in the mass management of purchase requisitions in a multi-ERP procurement landscape through Microsoft Excel uploads. For more information, see: Process Purchase Requisitions Centrally

 

 Back to top 

Display of overall invoice consumption on central contract item and distribution levels

Central purchasers are now able to track the usage and performance of their central contracts. Showing the overall invoice percentage as a consumption bar at item and distribution levels, a central purchaser can monitor and compare the invoice consumption to the goods receipt consumption and overall consumption of a given contract. We hereby improve transparency of actual invoice consumption directly within the central contract without the need to navigate into each connected system. This saves time and money. For more information, see: Manage Central Purchase Contracts

 

 Back to top

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn 😉

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series! 

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 60-minute-long recording and a presentation for Sourcing & Procurement as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below: 

 

 

 

Back to top

entry.title: Descriptions not syncing to producer in SEN
entry.content:
Hi,

We have added descriptions to all the groups in manager. When we try to synchronize the producer, these descriptions are not pushed to the producer. [We tried to Update all Objects from Server and Synchronize Workarea in producer. Still the description is not appearing in producer]. As the result of it, the compound documents generated in producer is not containing descriptions.

How to resolve this issue?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: EWM Staging Request error in SAP DM
entry.content: Hello Daniel, i am facing the same error. With staging method configuration you mean the activation of action definition /SCWM/SEND_STGMETHOD in 5.2.16 in the Guide? BR

entry.title: Email Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Elevate Your Email Notification Strategy 

Unlock the full potential of your SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation experience by mastering the art of email notifications. Figure out how you can supercharge your communication strategy.

Using the link embedded in the email notification, your end users can instantly navigate to the relevant items and easily handle their daily tasks.

Example Email Notification

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Two Powerful Options for Email Notifications

1. Seamless Integration with SAP Cloud ALM’s Built-in Service
  • Effortless Setup: No admin-level configuration required.
  • Professional Branding: Emails are sent under the name SAP Cloud ALM Notifications from the address sapcloudalm@notifications.sap.com.
  • Instant Activation: Start sending notifications immediately without any additional setup.
2. Leverage Your Own Email Infrastructure
  • Full Control: Use your own email server to customize the sender address.
  • Enhanced Security: Maintain control over your email infrastructure.
  • Simple Configuration: Set up an SMTP mail destination in your SAP BTP subaccount for SAP Cloud ALM. Follow the steps in Configuring an SMTP Mail Destination, and your notifications will be routed through your own server. 

Note: OAuth2 Client Credentials for Authentication supported as of now.

If that destination is configured, then the notification emails will only be sent via your own email server.

For detailed information regarding configuration you can check the Help Page - Configuring an SMTP Mail Destination.

Empower Users with Activation of Email Notifications

No matter which method you choose, users have the power to tailor their notification preferences:

  • Opt-In Flexibility: Unlike in-app notifications, email notifications are opt-in, giving users complete control.
  • User-Specific Settings: Each user can individually select which types of notifications should trigger an email. Administrators cannot mass-activate these settings, ensuring personalized experiences.

How to Activate Email Notifications

1. Access Your Profile: Click on your user profile in the top-right corner of the SAP Cloud ALM launchpad.
2. Navigate to Settings: Choose Settings > Notifications.
3. Customize Your Preferences: Check the Email flags for the notification types you want to receive emails for.

Note: You can only select notification types that are relevant to you. For instance, if you’ve never been assigned to a task, you won’t see this notification type in the settings and can’t enable email notifications for it.

Notification Settings

Following Notification Types are available

  • Defects: assigned to you

  • Features: assigned to you
  • Projects: New updates
  • Requirements: assigned to you
  • Requirements: new comment
  • Tasks: assigned to you
  • User management: open authorization requests

Wrap-Up

By harnessing these powerful options, you can ensure that critical updates and notifications are delivered directly to your inbox, keeping you informed and proactive. Choose the method that best fits your needs and take control of your SAP Cloud ALM notifications today!

entry.title: Display SLG1 Logs with Hierarchy (Application Log)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to display logs with hierarchy. I am using the FuBa 'APPL_LOG_DISPLAY' with the profile for DETLEVEL from the FuBa 'BAL_DSP_PROFILE_DETLEVEL_GET'

I want to display a list of several logs, but unfortunately the display now breaks down the logs strictly according to the hierarchy, so I can't see where one log ends and the next begins:

 

Call as follows:

entry.title: Re: Account assignment mandatory for material (enter acc. **bleep**. cat
entry.content: I have same problem and solved. I only struggled with solution after material type. click on "Define Attributes of Material Types". click on Quality/value updating. On position choose "Valuation Area" and select. now tick on qty updating and value updating. click save. try again same step and it should work.

entry.title: Re: Runtime Exception ITAB_DUPLICATE_KEY behaves differently for CORRESPONDING and FOR loop
entry.content: Sure, this would be correct, fully acknowledge👍

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Learning - can an admin deactivate mor...
entry.content:
Hi @DavidRaykovitz, 

there is no connector for the instructor, but the import Tool (System Administration -> System Management Tools -> Import Data) provides this capability. When viewing the template, you have a column for "Active", which is required. 

When uploading, you can use Import Option -> Update and you should be able to deactivate the accounts. 

The hard part is to extract the data, but you can build a quick report via stories you can use it as a foundation. 

Cheers
Marc

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Generative AI based Integration Flow Generation
entry.content:
Dear Deepak, any plans to make this available also for BTPEA/CPEA Customers?

Premium Edition is only available for subscriptions...

best

Martin

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04 download issue
entry.content:

I am having a problem downloading SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04. It seems that all parts redirect to the wrong file: Analytics_Data_Model_Starter_Pack_for_Telco_and_Utility. Can you please check this?

entry.title: Re: Po Related Variable in Flexible Workflow Body and Subject
entry.content: For body CDS view extension, for subject there is a BadI /IWPGW/IF_TGW_TASK_DATA

entry.title: Re: SEN Manager (Hana) not started
entry.content: Hi, Anton, thanks a lot for your help. I checked log, there is such error - "июл 25, 2024 7:39:10 AM org.apache.catalina.startup.ContextConfig processAnnotationsJar SEVERE: Unable to process Jar entry [module-info.class] from Jar [jar:file:/C:/Program%20Files/Apache%20Software%20Foundation/Tomcat%207.0/webapps/Manager_Hana/WEB-INF/lib/sen-lifecycle-common-10.6.11.5670.jar!/] for annotations org.apache.tomcat.util.bcel.classfile.ClassFormatException: Invalid byte tag in constant pool: 19". I attached log file to the main post. Could you please explain me how to fix it. As for file size, I usually just paste manager folder to the Tomcat web app folder. And thank you for the version, I'll keep it in mind

entry.title: Re: CCLM Querying data by BW content like 0SM_CCLM
entry.content:
Hello David,

thanks for your answer. I'm aware of decommissioning cockpit and I already created some projects. But I don't understand what system takes into account to judge, if an object is obsolete or not. I see lots of heavily used objects which are flagged for decommissioning. So usage can't be the onliest indicator.

We do have tons of DDIC objects, which are not used anymore. In past, colleagues deleted the code objects like PROG, but not the structures, data elements and domains used by it. There are cubes for referenced objects. But I'm interested in those which are NOT referenced

entry.title: New Flexible Enterprise Architecture Training Starting in September
entry.content:
As organizations continue to shift more of their workload to the cloud, the role of the enterprise architect is becoming increasingly vital. Bridging the gap between business and technology, enterprise architects ensure companies can reach their desired business outcomes through the effective use of technology. Recent numbers prove the demand for this role: It was ranked as the number one best career on Glassdoor recently – highlighting high job satisfaction and a competitive salary. 

Recognizing the advantages that this role can offer both individuals and organizations, SAP has a long tradition of delivering best-in-class enterprise architecture training. However, many of you asked for a more flexible format to learn these skills – and we’re happy to share that a new offering is now available for enterprise architects: 

Introducing a new cohort-based, blended training 

Get ready to level up your game with our new cohort-based blended enterprise architect learning! Combining the flexibility of self-paced learning on the SAP Learning site with interactive and fun case study training in a series of live sessions, you can now get the best of both worlds to prepare for your SAP Enterprise Architect Certification. 

Sounds good? Here’s what you need to know: 

To get started, head over to the SAP Learning site and register for one series of live sessions. Each series consists of six individual sessions that take about 2,5 hours each. The first cohorts will start on September 16 with two time slots available to serve your personal time zone. You don’t have time in September? Don’t worry – further cohorts will start in early November and registration is already open. 

First cohort starts in September 

Once you’re registered, all you need to do is wait for your kick-off event. The weekly sessions will be moderated and guided by an experienced speaker and delivered via Zoom. The series of live sessions will be based on a case study and built on each other – so make sure you don’t miss a session! 

Working through the units within the learning journey is essential as preparation for the sessions with the speaker. In the sessions with the trainer, the participants work on practical examples in a case study. The speaker does not teach any theory; this is taught in the learning journey “Exploring the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework Foundation”. 

On the days where no live session takes place, you can deepen your knowledge with the new learning journey “Exploring the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework Foundation”. Available mid-September, the course will teach you how the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework is structured and how you can tailor it to your needs. After finishing the five units, you’ll be able to create an architecture vision of capabilities and business values, define a target business architecture to achieve business goals, and more. In just under 16 hours, this course will deepen your good understanding of business strategy, organization, and process concepts. 

Schedule your certification exam individually 

Your SAP Certification exam can then be scheduled individually after the last live session has taken place and your learning journey has been completed – so only five weeks after you started training! And of course, sharing your new badge as SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect is highly recommended to demonstrate your latest and comprehensive understanding of SAP solutions to help businesses use technology to meet their visions. 

Let’s talk about prerequisites 

To make sure you can make the most out of this cohort-based, blended training, the learning journey and live sessions are designed for architects with an intermediate proficiency level who possess TOGAF (The Open Group Architecture Framework) foundation knowledge, are TOGAF-certified and have a good understanding of IT strategy, applications, data, and technology concepts. Please note that this offering is included in a subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub only.  

Sign up for the series of live sessions today and get ready to bring out your best with a new, flexible enterprise architecture training!

entry.title: Re: delivery indicator for completed Purchase Orders
entry.content: Hello Roxana, Thankyou for the clarification .I would like to confirm once again on scenartio 2:- as inbound delivery is entered 0 and not sure whether it is rcvd or not now the problem is delivery indicator is not completed and it is still in open po..How can we close the issue to clear that PO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content:
Hi!

Do you actually see that the predefined NC Code gets logged when you save the FASLE value in the DC parameter?

What are the routing step scripts that you use here?

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata
entry.content:
Connecting Beyond Screens: Embracing Your Local SAP Community

In the bustling heart of Kolkata, an exciting opportunity awaits for professionals immersed in the world of SAP systems. On the 17th of August 2024, at the prestigious Biswa Bangla Convention Centre, SAP enthusiasts will gather for an enriching community-driven event powered by Innoverv Team. Hosted by SAP Community member x Innoverv, this event promises to be a cornerstone in fostering local connections and expanding professional horizons.

Event Overview

Event Type: SAP Community meet up Kolkata
Duration: 4 hours (open-ended)
Location: BiswaBangla Convention Centre, Kolkata
Event Size: Approximately 500 participants
Host: SAP Community member x Innoverv
Day / Time: 17th August, 2024 from 9am to 1pm followed by Food & networking

What to Expect

This gathering is more than just a networking event; it’s a chance to engage face-to-face with fellow SAP professionals, share experiences, and explore potential collaborations. Whether you are a seasoned SAP expert or just starting your journey in SAP systems, this event welcomes all who are eager to connect and learn.

Event Components / Agenda

Networking Session: Begin with informal networking over refreshments, creating an atmosphere conducive to building new relationships.

Panel Discussion: Engage in a lively discussion led by Mr. Sourav Ganguly and Innoverv CEO, Partha Chakraborty, SAP Maestro, where you can ask questions, share insights, and gain valuable perspectives.

Work Opportunities: Discover career possibilities and partnership prospects with Accenture, our esteemed partner at the event.

Community Engagement: Join the  Kolkata - SAP Community  group to stay updated on future events and opportunities for involvement. 

Future Involvement: Learn how you can contribute to organizing or volunteering for upcoming SAP community events drop email to info@sitkolkata.org or connect by commenting in this post  Come Say Hello! What do you plan to learn or upski... - SAP Community.

Why Attend?

Whether you’re looking to expand your professional network, explore career opportunities, or simply connect with like-minded individuals passionate about SAP, this event offers a platform to achieve your goals. It’s a unique chance to move beyond virtual interactions and build meaningful connections in person.

How to Join

Interested in being part of this vibrant gathering? Mark your calendar for the 17th of August, 2024, and prepare to immerse yourself in an afternoon of learning and networking. While RSVPs are encouraged for planning purposes. 

Conclusion

Don’t miss out on this invaluable opportunity to engage with your local SAP community, gain insights from industry experts, and pave the way for future collaborations. Join us at the BiswaBangla Convention Centre on the 17th of August, 2024, and be part of a thriving network of SAP professionals dedicated to growth and innovation.

Please connect if you are interested in future local events organizing or volunteering with us. Let’s make this event a memorable milestone in our collective journey of SAP excellence!

(Please note that event details are subject to change. Refer to official SAP Community channels for the most current information and registration guidelines.)

#sapcommunity #kolkata #sitKol #meetup #networking #career #job

entry.title: Re: Unreadable characters in J2EE configtool
entry.content: Hello, try to use the consoleconfig.sh instead of configtool.sh, it does not require X screen, it runs in a console.

entry.title: Re: C_SECAUTH_20 SAP System Security and Authorizations - Going to Expire in March 2024
entry.content: Did you find any alternatives for this? I want to get this or something similar but it is already expired.

entry.title: Re: CCLM Querying data by BW content like 0SM_CCLM
entry.content: One addition to ULP Cube. I can analyze how often an object has been used in a year. But if an object has never been used, it does not show in ULP

entry.title: Re: How to increase report generation size limit in learn...
entry.content:
Hi @SonamGWW 

have a look at this KBA: 2232057 - Learning report exceeded the maximum size allowed (sap.com)

You have to adjust the the configuration for REPORT_System and the value asyncStorageMaxSize.
If your report is large, you might wanna ajust the timeout value also. 

Regards
Marc

entry.title: Re: Partial scrap confirmation in DM, Quantity Confirmati...
entry.content: Hi Rahul,

entry.title: Re: Why is my plant showing as red when I look a it on zc...
entry.content: So that must be a custom transaction, specific to your installation. Thus the community won't help you.

entry.title: Re: Standard Report for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Hello @Arielgwyn , please accept the solution if the reply answers your question. Thank you.
